title: ssDNA Extraction Protocol
author: Franziska Patzold
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8m9hu96

steps.title: Place dry tissue in 1
steps.instruction: Place dry tissue in 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and grind it, using an oscillating mill (MM 400, Retsch) for 1 min at a frequency of 25 Hz , using two sterile stainless steel balls with a diameter of 3 mm

steps.title: Insert to the ground tissue 45...
steps.instruction: Insert to the ground tissue 45 µL, Lysis buffer 5 µL, Proteinase K 50 µL, total volume mix well by handshaking, don´t vortex! and gently spin down the solution.

steps.title: Put the tube in an Mixing...
steps.instruction: Put the tube in an Mixing Block (MB-102, Thermocell) 56 °C 08:00:00, at least, better overnight Mix gently, and spin again.

steps.title: Add 100 µL, DNA Cleanup Binding...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL, DNA Cleanup Binding Buffer to the 50 µL, sample mix by pipetting up and down.

steps.title: Add 300 µL, ethanol (≥ 95%)...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL, ethanol (≥ 95%) Mix well by pipetting up and down or flicking the tube. Do not vortex.

steps.title: Insert column into collection tube, load...
steps.instruction: Insert column into collection tube, load sample onto column and close the cap. 00:01:00, Centrifuge then discard flow-through

steps.title: Re-insert column into collection tube
steps.instruction: Re-insert column into collection tube. Add 500 µL, DNA Wash Buffer and 00:01:00, Centrifuge Discard flow-through.

steps.title: Repeat Step 7
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 7. This step is recommended for removal of enzymes that may interfere with downstream applications (e.g., Proteinase K).

steps.title: Transfer column to a clean 1
steps.instruction: Transfer column to a clean 1.5 ml microfuge tube. Use care to ensure that the tip of the column does not come into contact with the flow-through. If in doubt, re-spin for 1 minute to ensure traces of salt and ethanol are not carried over to the next step.

steps.title: Add 17
steps.instruction: Add 17.5 µL, Elution Buffer to the center of the matrix Wait for 00:10:00, Incubation then spin for 00:01:00, Centrifuge to elute the DNA.

steps.title: Repeat Step 10 to extract all DNA
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 10 to extract all DNA
